title: lithocardium insigne
intro: Lithocardium insigne, also known as lithospermum officinale, is a flowering plant in the borage family that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. It has been found to have medicinal properties that include being a diuretic, an expectorant, and a vasodilator, making it useful for treating conditions such as kidney stones, bronchitis, and high blood pressure. The health benefits of lithocardium insigne include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Lithocardium insigne can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
